name: St. Mark Language School
description: St. Mark Language School is a distinguished Coptic institution in Beni Suef offering quality bilingual education within a values-driven environment.

name: Egyptian Japanese School Beni Suef
description: Part of the Egypt-Japan Education Partnership, this school blends Japanese educational philosophy (Tokkatsu) with a modern Egyptian curriculum.

name: Saint George International Schools
description: Saint George International Schools deliver the Cambridge IGCSE and A-Level programs with a focus on critical thinking and global citizenship.

name: Nile Egyptian School (NES) Beni Suef
description: The NES Beni Suef campus provides a world-class education within the renowned Nile Egyptian Schools network.

name: Salahaldin Future Stars Language School
description: Salahaldin Future Stars fosters the leaders of tomorrow through a comprehensive national language curriculum and extracurricular enrichment.

name: El Shorouk Official Language School
description: An official government language school in Beni Suef known for its high academic standards and dedicated teaching corps.

name: STEM School Beni Suef
description: A premier STEM school in Beni Suef, offering a research-based curriculum that ignites passion for science, technology, engineering, and math.

name: New East Language School
description: New East Language School combines a rigorous academic program with a warm, inclusive school culture for all students.

name: Othman bin Affan School
description: Named after the third Caliph, Othman bin Affan School provides Islamic-values-grounded education with a strong academic focus.

name: Saint Maria Language School
description: Saint Maria Language School is a respected Christian-founded institution in Beni Suef offering bilingual education with spiritual formation.
